name: Grommet
description: HPE's React-based framework providing accessibility, modularity, responsiveness, and theming in a tidy package

description.value: HPE's React-based framework providing accessibility, modularity, responsiveness, and theming in a tidy package

active-maintenance.comment: Active - v2.52.0 released December 11, 2025; 176 total releases; 7,085 commits

styling-approach.comment: Built with Styled Components CSS-in-JS library

component-model.comment: Styled component library with ready-to-use visuals and HPE design system

typescript.comment: Repository contains 28.5% TypeScript code with type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: SSR support available with Next.js; provides ssr and userAgent configuration options; grommet-nextjs example exists

rsc-compatible.comment: React Server Components compatibility not documented; CSS-in-JS (Styled Components) typically requires client components

design-system.comment: Implements HPE Design System; grommet-theme-hpe available for HPE-branded applications

dark-mode.comment: Built-in themeMode prop with 'dark', 'light', or 'auto' (system preference) options

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming via theme object prop; Grommet Themer tool available for visual customization

css-variables.comment: cssVars boolean prop exposes CSS custom properties for design tokens

design-tokens.comment: Theme object supports colors, typography, spacing, and component-level customization tokens

rtl-support.comment: RTL support implemented via <Grommet rtl={true} /> prop; completed October 2017

component-count.comment: Approximately 93 components across 9 categories: Layout, Type, Controls, Input, Data, Visualizations, Media, Utilities

text-input.comment: TextInput component with various input types

textarea.comment: TextArea component for multi-line text input

multi-select.comment: SelectMultiple component for multiple selection support

combobox.comment: Select component with search/filter capabilities; also MaskedInput for structured input

switch-toggle.comment: CheckBox component can be rendered as toggle switch; ToggleGroup for grouped toggles

slider.comment: RangeInput for single slider; RangeSelector for dual-thumb range selection

number-input.comment: No dedicated NumberInput component; use TextInput with type='number' or MaskedInput

tag-input.comment: Tag component available; can be combined with inputs for tag input functionality

pin-input.comment: No dedicated PinInput/OTP component; would need custom implementation with MaskedInput

color-picker.comment: No ColorPicker component in core library

date-picker.comment: DateInput component with calendar-based date selection

time-picker.comment: No dedicated TimePicker component; MaskedInput can be used for time format

date-range-picker.comment: DateInput does not support range selection; Calendar supports date ranges via selection prop but not as picker input

dropzone.comment: No dedicated drag-and-drop file upload area component

rating-input.comment: StarRating and ThumbsRating components for rating input

input-groups.comment: No built-in input group/addon component; FormField provides label/help text wrapping

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated component; can be composed with Box and DropButton

button-groups.comment: ToggleGroup component for grouped/segmented button controls

split-button.comment: DropButton component provides button with attached dropdown for secondary actions

table.comment: Table component for basic data tables

data-table.comment: DataTable component with sorting, filtering, resizing, pagination; comprehensive Data components suite (DataFilter, DataSort, DataSearch, etc.)

virtual-infinite-list.comment: InfiniteScroll utility component for virtualized scrolling of large lists

tree-view.comment: No dedicated Tree component; can use List with expandable rows or build custom with Accordion

list-view.comment: List component with styled items and selection support

card.comment: Card component for content containers; Cards component for card collections

avatar.comment: Avatar component with image and fallback support

badge.comment: No dedicated Badge component; use Box with custom styling or Tip for indicators

tag-chip-pill.comment: Tag component for standalone labels with removable option

timeline.comment: No dedicated Timeline component; can be composed with Diagram and Box

calendar.comment: Calendar component for month view display with date selection and range support

alert.comment: Notification component for static alert/banner messages

toast-notification.comment: Notification component can be used for temporary popup notifications; typically combined with Layer for positioning

progress-bar.comment: Meter component for linear progress indicators

progress-circle.comment: Meter component supports circular type for radial progress

spinner-loader.comment: Spinner component for indeterminate loading indicator

skeleton.comment: Skeleton component for content placeholders during loading

empty-state.comment: No dedicated EmptyState component; compose with Box, Heading, and Button

modal-dialog.comment: Layer component for modal overlays with focus trapping

drawer-sheet.comment: Layer component with position prop for slide-in panels from any edge; Sidebar component also available

popover.comment: Drop component for floating content anchored to target element

tooltip.comment: Tip component for hover hints with accessibility support

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu component for action menus; DropButton for button-triggered dropdowns

context-menu.comment: No dedicated right-click context menu component

command-palette.comment: No command palette (Cmd+K) component; would need custom implementation

tabs.comment: Tabs component for tab-based content switching

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs component does not support vertical orientation; use Nav or custom composition

breadcrumb.comment: No dedicated Breadcrumb component; can be composed with Anchor and Box

pagination.comment: Pagination component for page navigation controls

stepper.comment: No dedicated Stepper/Wizard component for multi-step processes

navigation-menu.comment: Nav and Menu components for site navigation with dropdown support

sidebar.comment: Sidebar component for collapsible sidebar navigation; also Layer with position for slide-in panels

bottom-navigation.comment: No dedicated mobile-style bottom navigation component

grid.comment: Grid component for CSS Grid layouts with responsive column definitions

stack.comment: Stack component for layered stacking; Box with Flexbox for vertical/horizontal stacking

container.comment: No dedicated Container component; use Box or Main with width constraints

divider.comment: No dedicated Divider component; use Box with border styling

aspect-ratio.comment: No dedicated AspectRatio component; use CSS or Box styling

collapsible.comment: Collapsible utility component for expandable/collapsible content; Accordion for grouped collapsibles

resizable.comment: DataTable columns support resize; no general-purpose resizable panel component

rich-text-editors.comment: Markdown component for rendering markdown; no integrated rich text editor

chart-libraries.comment: Built-in Chart, DataChart, Meter, and Distribution components for data visualization; WorldMap for geographic data

form-libraries.comment: Built-in Form component with FormField providing comprehensive form management with validation

animation-libraries.comment: No documented official animation library integration

icon-libraries.comment: grommet-icons library provides 600+ icons as React components

date-libraries.comment: Calendar and DateInput use native Date objects; no external date library dependency

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns with proper roles, aria-* attributes; regular ARIA fixes in releases

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support with roving tab index pattern; recent enhancements for SelectMultiple, Select components

screen-reader-tested.comment: Screen reader announcements actively fixed and improved; Safari VoiceOver support for sliders; FormField labels for RadioButtonGroup

focus-management.comment: SkipLinks component for skip navigation; Layer provides focus trapping; focusIndicator prop on components

wcag-level.comment: Supports W3C's WCAG 2.1 spec compliance; regular fixes for contrast requirements (WCAG 1.4.13)

accessibility-rating.comment: Good - WCAG 2.1 compliant, keyboard navigation with roving tab index, screen reader tested (VoiceOver), focus management, accessibility is a core design principle

bundle-size-full.comment: 194 kB minified + gzipped for full library; 4 dependencies including styled-components

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable; actual bundle size depends on components imported

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree-shaking for dead code elimination

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Good - comprehensive component docs with examples, API reference, theming guides; Grommet Designer for visual building

interactive-docs.comment: Official Storybook with 403 component stories; Grommet Designer for visual component building

storybook.comment: Official Storybook at storybook.grommet.io with theme switching support

figma-kit.comment: Sketch, Adobe XD, and Framer X design kits available; Figma icons community file exists but full Figma kit is a requested feature

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; Grommet Designer (designer.grommet.io) provides visual component building

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 36k weekly downloads; monthly downloads range 105k-166k over past year

commercial-support.comment: Apache-2.0 open source from HPE; community support via Slack; HPE Design System provides enterprise guidance for HPE products

style-override.comment: Theme object for global styling; inline style props on components; cssVars prop exposes CSS custom properties; extend theme for component overrides

compound-components.comment: Some compound patterns like Form.Field (via FormField), Cards with Card items

render-props.comment: Components use prop-based customization rather than render props pattern

slots.comment: React components; no Vue/Svelte-style named slots

unstyled-mode.comment: Styled component library; no headless/unstyled mode; styles are integral via Styled Components
